raw_consumer_statement:
Ordered sunglasses from XXXX. Order # ID : XXXX. Sunglasses arrived with XXXX broken lens and my account was charged {$140.00} plus {$9.00} tax. 
I returned the glasses XXXX day after receiving package and was given a tax credit for the {$9.00}. The merchant charged me a restocking fee of {$140.00}. 
Now, I have no sunglasses and a credit card charge for {$140.00} that citi bank is requiring me to pay.
